scripts.build:base: npm run prepare:base && npm run codegen && npm run build
scripts.build:base-sepolia: npm run prepare:base-sepolia && npm run codegen && npm run build
scripts.deploy:base: npm run build:base && pnpm exec goldsky subgraph deploy sup/$npm_package_version --path ./build
scripts.tag:base: pnpm exec goldsky subgraph tag create sup/$npm_package_version --tag prod
scripts.deploy:base-sepolia: npm run build:base-sepolia && pnpm exec goldsky subgraph deploy sup_test/$npm_package_version --path ./build
scripts.tag:base-sepolia: pnpm exec goldsky subgraph tag create sup_test/$npm_package_version --tag prod
